name: ticktock
description: Inline timestamps and per-turn deltas for Claude Code transcripts. Shows wall-clock time on every prompt and response, idle duration between events, response durations, subagent timing, and an optional session recap.

time_format.description: strftime format for the wall-clock timestamp on each line. Examples: %H:%M:%S (default), %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S, %l:%M %p.

prompt_label.description: Label prefixing prompt lines. Default: prompt

response_label.description: Label prefixing response lines. Default: response

idle_label.description: Label for the 'time since last response' delta. Default: idle

took_label.description: Label for the response-duration delta. Default: took

session_label.description: Label for the session-elapsed suffix (only shown when show_session is on). Default: session

subagent_label.description: Label for subagent timing lines. Default: subagent

recap_label.description: Prefix for the session-recap line emitted on session end. Default: 'session recap:'

show_deltas.description: Show per-event delta (idle/took) on prompt and response lines. 1 to show, 0 to hide. Default: 1

show_session.description: Append session-elapsed time to every prompt and response line. 1 to show, 0 to hide. Default: 0

show_turn.description: Prefix prompt and response lines with a per-session turn counter (#1, #2, ...). 1 to show, 0 to hide. Default: 0

log_history.description: Append every event as a JSON line to a monthly history log in the plugin data dir. 1 to enable, 0 to disable. Default: 0

recap_min_turns.description: Only emit the session recap when the session had at least this many turns. Default: 3

log_months.description: Delete history-YYYY-MM.jsonl files older than this many months. 0 disables pruning. Default: 12

sanity_cap.description: Suppress any delta larger than this many seconds (guards against stale state from crashed sessions). Default: 86400 (24h)

cleanup_days.description: Delete per-session state files older than this many days. 0 disables cleanup. Default: 30
